title: built an AI crypto tracker that never touches your funds 🔐 (short video demo)
author: Wolf-Studio
selftext:
Hey everyone 👋

I’ve been working on a project called MyTradeMate, an AI-powered crypto portfolio tracker focused 100% on security and local privacy.

🧠 What it does:
	•	Connects to your Binance account via Read-Only API — so it can only view, never trade or withdraw your funds.
	•	Runs AI models that analyze your portfolio and market trends to give smart insights (no signals, just intelligence).
	•	All your data stays encrypted locally on your device, not in the cloud.
